full_text:
Master Qingniu (Zhengfang)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Master Qingniu, styledZhengfang, was born in The East. Expert in astrology and divination, left Changan when Cao Cao invaded and went to Hanzhong then Yi.
